title: Live Updates: Iran Signals It Will Halt Strikes Against Israel After Hours of Attacks
summary_full: Iran’s Revolutionary Guards Corps said it had concluded its latest military operation against Israel after both countries traded strikes and an uneasy two-month truce broke down.
summary_public: Iran’s Revolutionary Guards Corps said it had concluded its latest military operation against Israel after both countries traded strikes and an uneasy two-month truce broke down.
